name: Free Trial Validation
goal: Validate the process — NOT profit. Learn to execute the methodology without breaking rules.

success_criteria.description: Pass if: all trades reviewed by agent before entry, no rule breaks, RRR >= 2:1 on every trade

what_we_are_NOT_trying_to_do: Hit 10% profit target (that is Phase 1 of the paid challenge)
Trade as many times as possible
questions_to_answer_before_paying: Can I follow the entry rules without emotion?
Do I accept when the agent says NO-GO?
Can I hold a trade to TP without closing early?
Is the workflow agent + MT5 comfortable and fast enough?

decision_after_stage_1.if_all_rules_followed: Pay for FTMO $25,000 Swing Challenge (~$50). Same rules, lower cost. Reimbursed when funded.
decision_after_stage_1.if_rules_broken: Stay on free demo 2 more weeks. Do not pay until process is clean.
decision_after_stage_1.skip_100k_for_now: Start with $25k, pass it, scale up. Do not pay $155 before validating.

timeframes.trend: D1 — EMA50 defines bias (above = long only, below = short only)
timeframes.setup: H4 — wait for pullback to EMA20
timeframes.entry: H4 — confirmation candle at EMA20 (engulfing or pin bar)

rules.entry: Only trade in the direction of D1 EMA50 trend

next_stage.name: FTMO $25k Swing Challenge
next_stage.trigger: Stage 1 success criteria met + decision to pay
